title: 7 Best Budget Video Conferencing Software Guide 2026
description: 7 Best best budget video compared for 2026. Analyze features, pricing, integrations and user reviews. Boost efficiency 25-40%, cut costs 20-30%. Find your id.
content:
Budget Video Conferencing Software Guide: 2026 Cost Analysis

Overview

This comprehensive guide analyzes budget-friendly video conferencing solutions for remote teams in 2026. We compare pricing tiers, feature limitations, and total costs across popular platforms to help organizations find affordable video meeting solutions without sacrificing essential functionality.

Budget Considerations

Organizations evaluating video conferencing costs should consider:

  • Per-user pricing: Monthly subscription costs per team member
  • Meeting duration limits: Free tier time restrictions
  • Participant caps: Maximum attendees per meeting
  • Hidden costs: Recording storage, webinar features, dial-in
  • Annual vs monthly: Savings from annual commitments

Zoom Pricing Analysis

Zoom pricing breakdown for budget planning:

  • Free tier: 40-minute meetings, 100 participants
  • Pro plan: $15.99/user/month, unlimited meetings
  • Business plan: $20.99/user/month, 300 participants
  • Enterprise: $20/user/month (min 10 users), 500+ participants
  • Annual savings: Approximately 17% discount on annual plans

Microsoft Teams Cost Breakdown

Microsoft Teams pricing options:

  • Free tier: 60-minute meetings, 100 participants
  • Business Basic: $6/user/month, includes Office Online
  • Business Standard: $12.50/user/month, includes desktop Office
  • Enterprise: $22/user/month, advanced security features
  • Value: Best value for teams needing Office suite

Google Meet Pricing

Google Meet cost structure:

  • Free personal: 60-minute meetings, 100 participants
  • Business Starter: $6/user/month, 100 participants
  • Business Standard: $12/user/month, 150 participants
  • Business Plus: $18/user/month, 250 participants, recording
  • Cost advantage: Integrated with Google Workspace tools

Webex Budget Options

Webex pricing tiers:

  • Free tier: 50-minute meetings, 100 participants
  • Starter plan: $15/user/month, 50 participants
  • Plus plan: $20/user/month, 100 participants, recording
  • Business plan: $30/user/month, 200 participants
  • Features: Whiteboarding included across all tiers

Open Source Budget Alternatives

Zero-cost self-hosted options:

  • Jitsi Meet: Free unlimited meetings, self-hosted
  • BigBlueButton: Free for education, open source
  • Nextcloud Talk: Free with Nextcloud deployment
  • Hosting costs: Server infrastructure required
  • Total cost: Typically $5-10/month for small server

Total Cost Comparison

Annual cost projections for 10-person team:

  • Zoom Pro: $1,920/year ($16/user x 12 months)
  • Teams Business Basic: $720/year ($6/user x 12 months)
  • Google Business Starter: $720/year ($6/user x 12 months)
  • Webex Starter: $1,800/year ($15/user x 12 months)
  • Jitsi self-hosted: ~$60-120/year server costs

Selection Recommendations

Choose based on budget and needs:

  • Minimal budget: Jitsi for unlimited free meetings
  • Best value: Microsoft Teams Business Basic ($6/user)
  • Office users: Teams includes Office Online
  • Google ecosystem: Google Meet Business Starter
  • Feature priority: Zoom Pro for meeting features
author: SaaS Pricing Analyst
